headline: BHP, Rio Tinto PLC ADR (RIO) and Caterpillar Advance Battery‑Electric Haul Truck Trial in Pilbara
summary: Rio Tinto PLC ADR (NYSE:RIO) is one of the mining stocks with the highest dividends. On June 23, BHP, Rio Tinto PLC ADR (NYSE:RIO), and Caterpillar launched a landmark trial of Cat 793 XE Early Learner battery‑electric haul trucks at BHP’s Jimblebar iron ore mine in Western Australia’s Pilbara. Following months of safety validation in […]
